linhasCriadas.texto: At night when everyone was fast asleep,
I looked at the sky through the window,
All adults say with a laugh,
Not an anime, not an anime!
Right now I can't move... That is my fate, but...
I won't give up anymore because I have awakened.
My burning, throbbing heart reflects the era...
It has the color of vividly blazing flames...
Crying, though I can't see it right now...
Searching, a guidepost floats up ahead.
I wanna have a pure time!
I'll take out what remains of my youth there,
beyond the hard times from now!
If these dry lips become wet,
Beyond time, towards a passionate era,
Because I believe it will move...
beyond the hard times from now...
At night when everyone was fast asleep,
I looked at the sky through the window,
All adults say with a laugh,
Not an anime, not an anime!
Sneaking out of the room at dawn
I kept on waiting at the beach,
and I saw such a great things.
People say "You read too much manga".
Not an anime, not an anime!
Out in the wasteland, where there are no roads,
it's difficult to lay down your rails
...you must learn what's on the other side

linhasCriadas.texto: At night when everyone was fast asleep,
I looked at the sky through the window,
All adults say with a laugh,
Not an anime, not an anime!
Oh, I can't help believing you
I've believed we're sure to meet again ever since that day
If we have heart, we'll be called together again
Ah, a trace in the sky
Oh, I can't help believing you
some warm memories within everyone's heart
Don't throw it away because of this painful age
Until the day we gaze up again
at the blue sky we once saw
Out in the wasteland, where there are no roads,
it's difficult to lay down your rails
...you must learn what's on the other side

linhasCriadas.texto: O, hundreds upon thousands upon millions of stars!
When we believe that the time has come to make the connection
The time of beginning, the time that every heartbeat is longing for.
Recombine the puzzle of the stars and change time
If you paint the stars that betray you
And twist and turn into darkness...
We can still stop it, because life is still answering
If I can amass as many lives as there're stars,
O galaxies, show me how to change the light
Become the weight of the lives that I hold in my hands
I still can't quite see my guiding light in the sky
Let the light of 10 million years touch my hand!
